The root cause of the bug is that the fu:
Update Parameter Checking
The function maybeDeclareQualifiedName should be updated to check if the new function has the same number of parameters as the original function. This can be done by adding a check for the number of parameters in the function definition and comparing it to the number of parameters in the original function. If the numbers are different, a warning should be generated.

Add Reassignment Handling
The function maybeDeclareQualifiedName should be updated to handle the case when a property is reassigned to a new function. This can be done by adding a check for reassignment and updating the type of the property accordingly. If the new function has a different type or parameter list, a warning should be generated.
